buy.title: Buy Paper Summarizer Pro
buy.subtitle: Choose a plan that fits your needs. Pay securely with credit card, PayPal, or Apple Pay via Gumroad. Your Pro token will be issued automatically after purchase.

tabs.lemonSqueezy: Lemon Squeezy (Credit Card / PayPal / Google Pay)

buy.step1Desc: Click "Buy Now" above. Pay securely via Gumroad (credit card, PayPal, Apple Pay) or Lemon Squeezy (credit card, PayPal, Google Pay).
buy.step2DescGumroad: After purchase, your token is created automatically. For Gumroad: you'll also receive an email. For Lemon Squeezy: use your order ID to claim your token below. Check your spam folder if you don't see the email.
buy.step3Desc: Paste your token on the home page or send it in the Authorization: Bearer <token> header for API access.
buy.manualClaimDesc: Didn't receive the email? Enter your Gumroad sale ID or Lemon Squeezy order ID to look up your token.
buy.orderIdPlaceholder: Gumroad sale ID / Lemon Squeezy order ID...
buy.tokenUsage: Use this token on the home page to unlock Pro features!
buy.checkTokenDesc: Already have a token? Enter it here to check your plan and remaining limits.
buy.tokenInfo: Name: {name} · Max: {max} requests per window · Remaining: {remaining}
buy.faqAccount: Do I need an account to purchase?
buy.faqAccountAns: Not necessarily. Gumroad: Check out as a guest with PayPal or credit card. Lemon Squeezy: Check out with credit card, PayPal, or Google Pay.
buy.faqDelivery: How long does token delivery take?
buy.faqDeliveryAns: It's instant. As soon as the payment is confirmed, our system creates your token. For Gumroad, you'll also receive an email. For Lemon Squeezy, use the Manual Claim form above with your order ID.
buy.faqEmail: What if I don't receive the email (Gumroad)?
buy.faqEmailAns: Check your spam folder first. If it's not there, look up the Gumroad sale ID from your receipt and use the Manual Claim form above to retrieve your token.
buy.faqLostOrderId: What if I lost my Lemon Squeezy order ID?
buy.faqLostOrderIdAns: You can find it in your Lemon Squeezy purchase confirmation email. Alternatively, contact us at selina_zxw@qq.com with the email you used to purchase and we can look it up.
buy.faqRefundAnsGumroad: Refund Policy: As Paper Summarizer is a digital product, all sales are final and we do not offer refunds. Please confirm your needs before purchasing.
buy.faqBoth: Can I use both Gumroad and Lemon Squeezy tokens?
buy.faqBothAns: Absolutely. Your token works the same way regardless of where you purchased it. You can even use the same token for both the web app and API.
buy.faqTrialAns: Free users get 3 summaries per day to try out the service. No credit card required.
buy.chineseUsers: Chinese users: pay with 爱发电 instead
